title: Missing #[non_exhaustive] on SeqExhausted error struct
description:
Location: rust/lichen-oscore/src/seqnum.rs:17
Issue: SeqExhausted is a public unit struct. If fields are added later, it breaks callers.
Impact: Low (unit struct, unlikely to gain fields), but good practice for public error types.
Fix: Add #[non_exhaustive] attribute to SeqExhausted.
close_reason: Issue misdescribed - SeqExhausted is an enum variant, not a struct. OscoreError enum already has #[non_exhaustive] at line 88.
